description: You must apply historical F-4 Phantom stability fixes to a prototype model. The prototype model is located at /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/phantom_prototype.vsp3. Open it in OpenVSP. A specification memo at /home/ga/Desktop/stability_fixes.txt details the required changes. Specifically: (1) Select the Main_Wing component. Keep its inboard section (Section 1) Dihedral at 0°, but change its outboard section (Section 2) Dihedral to +12.0°. (2) Select the Horiz_Tail component and change its Dihedral to -23.0° (anhedral). Save the corrected model as /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/phantom_production.vsp3.
